untranslatable_reason: The entry condition requires comparing intraday low to 'daily lows of the previous 55 days' (a rolling 55-day minimum), which cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. The closest allowed indicator price_pos_20 only provides 20-day positioning. Additionally, the exit condition references 'S1 or S2 reversal' which requires pivot point logic not fully specified, and the portfolio-relative loss (2% of portfolio value) cannot be expressed as a simple indicator comparison.
translation_notes: Attempted to map: (1) Entry: intraday low vs 55-day low minimum → used price_pos_20 as fallback but this is insufficient; (2) Exit: intraday high vs 20-day high maximum → mapped to dc_upper (Donchian 20-day upper) which represents highest high of 20 days; (3) S1/S2 pivot reversals not translatable without explicit pivot reversal detection; (4) Portfolio-relative stop loss not expressible. Signal requires custom indicator support for rolling 55-day minimum or explicit 55-day Donchian channel.
